title: Apocalypse Z: The Beginning of the End
originalTitle: Apocalipsis Z: el principio del fin
posterAlt: Apocalypse Z: The Beginning of the End (2024) movie poster
tmdbOverview: When a kind of rabies that transforms people into aggressive creatures spreads across the planet, Manel isolates himself at home with his cat, relying on his wits to survive; but soon they must go out in search of food, by land and by sea, dodging many dangers.
synopsis: Apocalypse Z: The Beginning of the End is a 2024 drama, action and horror film from Spain. It carries a 6.1 rating on IMDb. It's one of the titles we feature across our 2020s and genre rankings. It carries a 16 certification (BR rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
